records.question: What addresses exactly match 045 Marquardt Village Suite 484 and are linked to both customers and delivery route locations?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT addresses.address_id FROM addresses
JOIN customer_addresses ON addresses.address_id = customer_addresses.address_id
JOIN delivery_route_locations ON addresses.address_id = delivery_route_locations.location_address_id
WHERE addresses.address_details = '045 Marquardt Village Suite 484'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT addresses.address_id
FROM addresses
JOIN customer_addresses ON addresses.address_id = customer_addresses.address_id
JOIN delivery_route_locations ON addresses.address_id = delivery_route_locations.location_address_id
WHERE addresses.address_details = '045 Marquardt Village Suite 484'

records.question: Which addresses in Giovannaton, Tennessee are linked to employees named Cristian whose phone is 1-833-492-9430, have customer addresses dated on or before 2012-08-31 15:41:03, and are located on delivery routes containing Pfannerstill and Rutherford?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT addresses.address_id FROM addresses
JOIN customer_addresses ON addresses.address_id = customer_addresses.address_id
JOIN delivery_route_locations ON addresses.address_id = delivery_route_locations.location_address_id
JOIN employees ON addresses.address_id = employees.employee_address_id
WHERE delivery_route_locations.location_name LIKE '%Pfannerstill and Rutherford%' AND employees.employee_phone = '1-833-492-9430' AND customer_addresses.date_from <= '2012-08-31 15:41:03' AND employees.employee_name = 'Cristian' AND addresses.city = 'Giovannaton' AND addresses.state_province_county = 'Tennessee'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT addresses.address_id
FROM addresses
JOIN customer_addresses ON addresses.address_id = customer_addresses.address_id
JOIN customers ON customer_addresses.customer_id = customers.customer_id
JOIN employees ON customers.customer_id = employees.employee_id
JOIN order_deliveries ON employees.employee_id = order_deliveries.driver_employee_id
JOIN delivery_route_locations ON order_deliveries.location_code = delivery_route_locations.location_code
JOIN delivery_routes ON delivery_route_locations.route_id = delivery_routes.route_id
WHERE addresses.city = 'Giovannaton'
  AND addresses.state_province_county = 'Tennessee'
  AND employees.employee_name = 'Cristian'
  AND employees.employee_phone = '1-833-492-9430'
  AND customer_addresses.date_to <= '2012-08-31 15:41:03'
  AND (delivery_routes.route_name LIKE '%Pfannerstill%' OR delivery_routes.route_name LIKE '%Rutherford%')

records.question: Which addresses in Giovannaton are linked to customers, delivery routes, and employees?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT addresses.address_id FROM addresses
JOIN customer_addresses ON addresses.address_id = customer_addresses.address_id
JOIN delivery_route_locations ON addresses.address_id = delivery_route_locations.location_address_id
JOIN employees ON addresses.address_id = employees.employee_address_id
WHERE addresses.city = 'Giovannaton'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT a.address_id
FROM Addresses a
JOIN Customer_Addresses ca ON a.address_id = ca.address_id
JOIN Regular_Orders ro ON ca.customer_id = ro.distributer_id
JOIN Actual_Orders ao ON ro.regular_order_id = ao.regular_order_id
JOIN Order_Deliveries od ON ao.actual_order_id = od.actual_order_id
JOIN Delivery_Route_Locations drl ON od.location_code = drl.location_code
JOIN Employees e ON od.driver_employee_id = e.employee_id
WHERE a.city = 'Giovannaton'
